settings.title: NicePayments Settings
settings.test_mode_hint: Real card authorization/withdrawal notifications may still occur in test mode. Test account payments are batch-cancelled around 23:30 on the same day.
settings.test_mid_hint: NicePayments shared test MID. No change needed for testing.
settings.test_merchant_key_hint: NicePayments shared test key. No change needed for testing.
settings.live_mid_hint: Check in NicePayments merchant portal > Merchant Info > KEY Management. Enter only the part after 'SR'.
settings.live_mid_example: e.g. If your MID is SRpaytestm, enter only paytestm → Result: SRpaytestm
settings.live_mode_warning_body: Real payments are being processed. Make sure your live MID and merchant key are correctly configured.
settings.vbank_notify_hint: When using virtual accounts, register the URL below in the NicePayments merchant portal (Merchant Info settings). Deposits will be automatically notified to this address.
settings.redirect_success_url_hint: Supports relative paths (/shop/...) or full URLs (https://...). {orderId} will be replaced with the actual order number.
settings.redirect_fail_url_hint: Supports relative paths or full URLs. Error details are appended as query parameters.
settings.use_escrow_hint: Enables escrow payment for buyer protection when selling physical goods. Delivery registration is required after escrow payment.
settings.section_easy_pay_hint: Enable the easy pay services you want to offer. Only activate services where you have a signed contract with NicePayments.
settings.easy_pay_applepay_hint: Available on Safari and Apple devices only
settings.easy_pay_allow_with_other_pg_hint: When enabled, NicePay easy pay buttons will appear on the checkout page even when another PG is set as the default payment provider.

admin.transaction_query_description: Query payment status directly using a NicePayments transaction ID (TID).
admin.order_verify_description: Query real-time payment status from NicePayments server.
admin.vbank_noti_description: Audit log of NicePay deposit notifications (auto-accumulated)
admin.vbank_noti_not_loaded: Click the button to view the NicePay deposit notification log.
admin.escrow_payment_notice: This is an escrow payment. Buyer confirmation is required after delivery registration.
admin.test_mode_order_notice: This order was processed in test mode. Real card authorization/withdrawal notifications may occur, but NicePayments test account payments are batch-cancelled around 23:30 on the same day. Verify live payment status before shipping.
admin.test_mode_settings_warning_title: Warning: NicePayments is currently set to test mode.
admin.test_mode_settings_warning_body: Test payments do not create real payments. If the shop is live, switch this plugin to live payment mode before operating.

user.vbank_notice: If deposit is not completed by the due date, the order will be auto-cancelled.
